text: Registration for the MACCF Annual Open Tournament is now open. June event at the Silver Spring Civic Center. 100+ participants expected. Details on the federation site.
The youth chess program at Sligo Creek Middle School welcomed 8 new students this quarter. Strong interest in the after-school sessions. Mentors needed.
Congratulations to all participants in the Virginia regional qualifier. Three players from our exchange program advanced to the state championship.
Board meeting recap: the 2027 tournament planning session is confirmed for December 4. Budget review and venue logistics on the agenda.
